'''Samarians''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] native to the desert [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Samaria/Legends|Samaria]]. The Samarians were engaged in the process of setting up a trade agreement between their neighbors the [[Roshan]]s, however the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] intervened.

{{Species-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Samarians were most likely [[Human/Legends|Humans]]; however, they were never positively identified as such in ''A Tangled Web'', ''Return of the Dark Side'' and ''Reckoning''.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: A Tangled Web]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: Return of the Dark Side]]''
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: Reckoning]]''
